name: Bachelor's Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds beef chuck, cut into 1-inch cubes
3 carrots, peeled, split lengthwise, cut into 4-inch pieces
2 cans condensed tomato soup (10.75 ounces each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wipe the beef cubes well and toss with bread crumbs, salt, and pepper.
2. Place the coated beef cubes in the Crock-Pot and add the remaining ingredients; stir to combine.
3. Cover and cook on Low for 10-12 hours or on High for 3-5 hours.
4. Serves 6.
